repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1: fixed-overlap equivalence sanity theorem; eid_dml_orth_uniform_v2_angle0: canonical-EIF equivalence guardrail

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018ECTJ product-rate DML plus ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML/Newey1994Econometrica common-EIF variance calibration

repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest eid_dml_orth_uniform_v2_angle0 spectral-report frontier and angle1 LRO-normalization frontier do not state a joint compatibility-cone plus numerator/variance pseudo-truth partition

published_prior_art.cite: none; closest ChernozhukovEtAl2018ECTJ, ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO, ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML, DukesVansteelandtWhitney2024JMLR, BonviniKennedyDukesBalakrishnan2024 do not give the three-report iff partition

repo_prior_art.cite: none; prior eid_dml_orth_uniform witnesses target weak-overlap or LRO-normalization separation, not identical-rate non-rectangular compatibility directions

published_prior_art.cite: none; AtheyImbensWager2018JRSSB motivates overlap/balancing diagnostics but does not supply this DML/LRO/ADML pseudo-truth witness

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The ADML baseline Riesz coefficient \(\zeta_0\) is used in the compatibility cone but never defined, and the proposal does not assume \(\alpha_0\) lies in the selected ADML feature span, so the common-EIF/product-rate guardrail can fail before the conjectural partition is reached.

soundness_flags.label: Assumption compatibility
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed linearization of the propensity-induced Riesz perturbation omits the logit derivative factor \(p_0(X)(1-p_0(X))\); as written \(h^p_a\) is not the derivative of \(D/\bar p-(1-D)/(1-\bar p)\) with \(\bar p=\Lambda(B^T\gamma)\).

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup / variance reports
soundness_flags.one_line: The DML/LRO/ADML variance maps are evaluated at the plug-in target \(\theta(\eta)=E[\bar\mu_1-\bar\mu_0]\), but the published AIPW/DML report solves the augmented moment and has a report-specific pseudo-target including the residual correction \(E[\bar\alpha(Y-\bar\mu_D)]\).

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add an explicit baseline representer condition: either require saturated finite-support \(B\) so \(\alpha_0=C^T\zeta_0\), or redefine the ADML branch around the projection target and state that the common-EIF guardrail only applies in the representable subclass.
Correct the compatibility-cone algebra by deriving \(h^p_a\) from \(q=p_0(1-p_0)B^T\delta\gamma\), then restate Conjecture 1 with the corrected cone.
Define report-specific pseudo-targets \(\theta_m(\eta)\) for DML, LRO, and ADML before defining \(V_m\), and separate numerator drift from variance estimation around the solved report moment.

recommended_next_step: Patch the three well-posedness defects in the formal setup before sending the proposal back for novelty review.
